title: The Caged Lady (Varen’s Orb) — resolved
bodyText:
A dark orb ringed in dancing light that visits Varen's trances; growing brighter, trying to change shape. Female voice: *"I am a guide to those who need escape and refuge. I am in a cage. An unending cage. Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."* Flew over **Eddy** and faded (S07).

# Resolved (grill 2026-07-09): it is Eilistraee
The orb and the voice are **[[eilistraee]]** — caged in the Pool by Lolth, reaching Varen through the same channel as his mark ([[thread-varens-mark]]). Every line fits her, no Leliana needed:
- *"a guide to those who need escape and refuge"* — her whole purpose.
- *"in an unending cage"* — Lolth trapped her in the Pool.
- *"help your friend, help find him, bring him back"* — now literal (restructure 2026-07-09): **[[lathander|Lathander]] is in a DIFFERENT pool that must be FOUND** — his return is her own salvation (sun → moon restores her power). She's coaching Varen to help **Eddy**, whose true escape also waits at Lathander's pool.

So the orb pushes Varen at the Chapter-1 climax (freeing HER, [[arc-chapter-1]]) and seeds the Chapter-2 god-hunt.
